lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Who conquered the Israelites during Samson’s time?
What were God’s special rules for Samson?
answers: No wine, no unclean foods, and no cutting his hair
Wear old clothes and eat bugs
Go to bed at 8 pm and brush his teeth three times a day

questions.text: Because God’s Spirit was with him, what did Samson do to the lion?
answers: Ripped it apart with his bare hands
Scared it away with a shout
Swung it around by its tail

questions.text: When the Philistines tied Samson with new ropes, what did he do?
answers: Ripped them apart like burnt string
Nothing – he couldn't escape the ropes

questions.text: What weapon did Samson use to defeat 1,000 men?
What did the Philistines secretly pay Delilah to do?
answers: Find out the secret of Samson’s strength
Convince Samson to join the Philistine army

questions.text: When Delilah asked Samson his secret, what did he do the first three times?
answers: He said he'd tell her if she gave him a kiss

questions.text: When did Samson lose God’s Spirit and his strength?
answers: When he washed his hair with too much shampoo

questions.text: What did the Philistines do to Samson after capturing him?
answers: They poked out his eyes and put him in prison
They threw him into a lion's den
They made him join their army

questions.text: How did Samson defeat the Philistines in the end?
answers: He pushed down the pillars and collapsed their temple
He escaped and fought them again
He called an army to help him
He used another donkey's jawbone to attack the king
